overall.description: Gameplay footage from Star Wars Outlaws featuring the protagonist Kay Vess exploring a multi-level underground market with industrial sci-fi architecture. The character navigates through warm-lit merchant areas, passes an Imperial security checkpoint, descends to lower levels with dramatic lighting changes, and enters a dimly lit workshop.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor market promenade with merchant stalls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the upper market level, passing various stalls and NPCs with Nix following

notable_agents.action: vendor standing behind a food stall preparing items

entered.detail: metal safety railing along the edge of the walkway overlooking lower levels
wooden and metal merchant stall with various goods on display
network of industrial pipes and conduits running along the ceiling
large cooking apparatus and food preparation station

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a bustling indoor market with warm orange lighting, passing by merchant stalls and industrial railings that overlook lower levels. Various NPCs stand near their stalls, and the environment features prominent metal architecture with overhead pipes.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular plaza with Imperial security checkpoint

events.description: exiting the narrow market corridor into the open circular plaza area

agents.ego_description: approaching the security checkpoint with two stormtroopers standing guard near a gated entrance

notable_agents.action: stormtrooper standing guard at the security gate holding a blaster

entered.detail: large circular tiled floor with geometric patterns
tall illuminated advertisement poster on the wall
metal security gate with vertical bars blocking the passage
Imperial stormtrooper in white armor standing at attention

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a circular plaza with a large advertisement poster on the left wall. Two stormtroopers stand guard at a security gate ahead, and the character approaches the checkpoint before the segment ends.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated walkway overlooking industrial fire pit

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back away from the checkpoint
entering the stairwell to descend to lower levels

agents.ego_description: turning back from the checkpoint, walking along the railing overlooking the fire pit, and descending a metal stairwell

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in the opposite direction along the walkway

entered.detail: raised walkway with metal railings overlooking the lower industrial area
orange glowing light from lava or fire visible through the railing below
opening leading to a descending metal staircase
industrial metal staircase with grated steps leading downward

segments.scene_description: The character turns away from the checkpoint and walks along an elevated walkway with a glowing fire pit visible below through the railings. Various NPCs walk in the opposite direction as the character approaches and begins descending a metal stairwell.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow maintenance corridor with green neon lighting

events.description: lighting shifts dramatically from warm orange to green neon as character enters the lower corridor
environment becomes significantly darker as character moves through the passage

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow corridors, descending stairs, and moving from green-lit areas into darker passages

entered.detail: confined passageway with walls covered in pipes and industrial equipment
green colored artificial lighting fixtures illuminating the corridor
large ventilation grates and fans mounted on the walls
thick industrial pipes running vertically along the corridor walls

segments.scene_description: The character descends into a narrow maintenance corridor illuminated by green neon lights. The environment shifts from the open market above to a confined industrial space with ventilation grates and pipes covering the walls, then transitions into darker passages.

scene_state.functional_zone: cluttered workshop with workbenches and mechanical equipment

events.description: entering the dimly lit workshop area from the narrow corridor

agents.ego_description: entering a workshop and approaching a workbench cluttered with mechanical parts and tools

notable_agents.action: mechanic working at a bench in the background

entered.detail: large workbench covered with various mechanical components and tools
scattered mechanical components and equipment parts on surfaces
metal shelves holding various containers and equipment
racks holding various hand tools and implements

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dimly lit, cluttered workshop filled with workbenches, tools, and mechanical parts. The space has a confined, industrial feel with shelves of equipment along the walls, and a mechanic can be seen working in the background as the character approaches the central workbench.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling industrial market that transitions from warm merchant stalls to a guarded security plaza and finally down toward the lower levels. It begins by weaving through a crowded indoor bazaar filled with orange lighting, merchant stalls, and overhead pipes. As the character moves forward, the space opens into a circular plaza dominated by a large advertisement poster and a security gate manned by two stormtroopers. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the checkpoint to traverse an elevated walkway, passing NPCs while a glowing fire pit flickers below the railings. Finally, the camera follows the character as they leave the upper promenade and begin descending a metal stairwell into the depths of the complex.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit industrial corridor into the cluttered interior of a dimly lit workshop. It begins with the character descending into a confined maintenance space, where the open atmosphere of the market is replaced by walls lined with ventilation grates and pipes under a green glow. As the camera moves deeper, the neon lighting fades into darker passages that lead directly into a cramped mechanical workspace. The scene then opens into a room filled with workbenches and shelves of equipment, shifting from the sterile corridor to a cluttered environment of tools and parts. Finally, the camera approaches a central workbench while a mechanic continues to work in the background of the industrial space.
